creator: kaoru@kaisei.org
text:
Hi,

The diff from japanese/asterisk-sounds is following:
Please use this.

--- asterisk-sounds/Makefile	2010-05-25 22:55:10.000000000 +0900
+++ asterisk16-sounds/Makefile	2010-06-12 07:16:06.000000000 +0900
@@ -5,33 +5,35 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/japanese/asterisk-sounds/Makefile,v 1.9 2010/05/25 13:55:10 tota Exp $
 #
 
-PORTNAME=	asterisk
-PORTVERSION=	1.4
-PORTREVISION=	7
+PORTNAME=	asterisk16-sounds
+PORTVERSION=	1.6
 CATEGORIES=	japanese net
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/sounds/${PORTVERSION:S|.|_|}/ \
-		http://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/sounds/${PORTVERSION:S|.|_|}/
-PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-sounds
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S|s$||}-jp_${PORTVERSION:S|.||}_beta
+MASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/sounds/${PORTVERSION:S|.|_|}/ \
+	ftp://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/sounds/${PORTVERSION:S|.|_|}/
+DISTNAME=	asterisk-sound-jp_${PORTVERSION:S|.||}_pre
 
-MAINTAINER=	jfkimura@yahoo.co.jp
-COMMENT=	Japanese sound files for Asterisk
+MAINTAINER=	kaoru@kaisei.org
+COMMENT=	Japanese sound files for Asterisk 1.6
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	asterisk:${PORTSDIR}/net/asterisk
+RUN_DEPENDS=	asterisk:${PORTSDIR}/net/asterisk16
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
-ASTERISKDIR=	${DATADIR}/${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S|-||}
-DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}
-
-post-extract:
-	${MV} ${WRKDIR}/jp/README.txt ${WRKDIR}
+ASTERISKDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/asterisk/sounds
 
 do-install:
 	@-${MKDIR} ${ASTERISKDIR}
-	@${CP} -pR ${WRKDIR}/jp ${ASTERISKDIR}
+	@-${MKDIR} ${ASTERISKDIR}/ja
+	for gsm in ${WRKDIR}/ja/*.gsm; do \
+		${INSTALL_DATA} "$$gsm" ${ASTERISKDIR}/ja ; \
+	done
+	@${MKDIR} ${ASTERISKDIR}/ja/digits
+	for digitgsm in ${WRKDIR}/ja/digits/*.gsm; do \
+		${INSTALL_DATA} "$$digitgsm" ${ASTERISKDIR}/ja/digits ; \
+	done
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}/ja
-	@cd ${WRKDIR} && ${INSTALL_DATA} README.txt ${DOCSDIR}/ja
+	@cd ${WRKDIR}/ja && ${INSTALL_DATA} README.txt ${DOCSDIR}/ja
 .endif
 
 post-install:
diff -ruN asterisk-sounds/distinfo asterisk16-sounds/distinfo
--- asterisk-sounds/distinfo	2010-05-25 22:55:10.000000000 +0900
+++ asterisk16-sounds/distinfo	2009-10-09 18:15:43.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (asterisk-sound-jp_14_beta.tar.gz) = f03267b41be8d9e3fe1051d87ed19d01
-SHA256 (asterisk-sound-jp_14_beta.tar.gz) = 15cde0b2de41a13dd009e517f2d28ac0859b07aad3979b120fe47bece66615df
-SIZE (asterisk-sound-jp_14_beta.tar.gz) = 945915
+MD5 (asterisk-sound-jp_16_pre.tar.gz) = 1c2d879965358241f53a1e5101371e74
+SHA256 (asterisk-sound-jp_16_pre.tar.gz) = 576d2f47beded83449b69dbb32c4c0467451547bf4d126346000bc3bf5eb4071
+SIZE (asterisk-sound-jp_16_pre.tar.gz) = 945968
diff -ruN asterisk-sounds/pkg-message asterisk16-sounds/pkg-message
--- asterisk-sounds/pkg-message	2010-05-25 22:55:10.000000000 +0900
+++ asterisk16-sounds/pkg-message	2010-06-12 07:17:35.000000000 +0900
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 
  For example,
  1. Download app_voicemail.c.yymmdd-01.patch and say.c.yymmdd-01.patch from
-    ftp://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/patch/1.4.X/
-    where 1.4.X is corresponding to PORTVERSION in
-    ports/net/asterisk/Makefile.
+    ftp://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/patch/1.6.0.X/
+    where 1.6.0.X is corresponding to PORTVERSION in
+    ports/net/asterisk16/Makefile.
  2. Put them to ports/net/asterisk/files as patch-apps::app_voicemail.c and
     patch-main::say.c, respectively.
  3. Reinstall net/asterisk.
diff -ruN asterisk-sounds/pkg-plist asterisk16-sounds/pkg-plist
--- asterisk-sounds/pkg-plist	2010-05-25 22:55:10.000000000 +0900
+++ asterisk16-sounds/pkg-plist	2009-10-09 19:04:19.000000000 +0900
